title: Field-requirements capability proof
purpose: A machine-checkable map from frontier-lab field requirements (DeepSeek / High-Flyer's 2026 hiring categories) to concrete, existing artifacts in THIS repo: modules, passing tests, and measured evidence. tools/verify_field_requirements.py walks this file and fails CI if any cited artifact is missing or does not compile — so the proof is enforced, not asserted.

marketSource.drive: DeepSeek / High-Flyer 2026 recruitment — ~33 roles across 7 categories; pivot to agentic AI + owning the data/eval/infra stack.

statusLegend.demonstrated: Module(s) + passing tests, and — where the capability is a measurable claim — a committed measured artifact. The strongest tier this repo offers.
statusLegend.candidate: Built and tested, but the evidence is first-party / seed / not-yet-independently-validated, OR the underlying scientific claim is explicitly unproven (see the failure ledger).
statusLegend.interface-only: A fail-closed interface with a toy reference implementation; the name describes the slot, not a proven capability (see docs/11-Platform/AGI-Missing-Pillars.md).

honesty: Statuses are deliberately conservative. 'demonstrated' is about the ENGINEERING (the function exists, is tested, and where applicable produces a measured number under the repo's gate), never a claim that the broader research goal (AGI, beating a frontier lab) is achieved. Most market-facing value sits in agent evaluation + domain data discipline, which is where the repo is strongest.

capabilities.marketCategory: Agent Data Evaluation Expert (new role) · Deep-learning research
capabilities.claim: Score a whole agent trajectory for mid-plan faithfulness, fail-closed, with a deterministic reproducible benchmark.
capabilities.measured: verdict accuracy 1.0 (Wilson-95 [0.77, 1.0], N=13), detection F1 1.0, localization 6/6 — deterministic; labels first-party/seed.
capabilities.limits: Default judge is lexical (no semantic entailment without an injected LLM judge); labels are first-party. Third-party trajectory pack is OPEN.

capabilities.claim: Detect fake legal citations (existence) and misstated authorities (holding faithfulness), fail-closed, measured under the no-overclaim gate.
capabilities.measured: legal_holding_faithful bench: validated=true under >=2 judge families + kappa>=0.40 + 3 runs (see artifact).
capabilities.limits: Bundled register is an illustrative snapshot, not a citator; production needs the live resolver.

capabilities.claim: Verify medical citations (PMID/DOI/guideline existence) and recommendation faithfulness, fail-closed; not clinical advice.
capabilities.measured: Wiring proven offline (existence deterministic; faithfulness judge abstains without a model). No measured faithfulness number yet.
capabilities.limits: Register is a tiny seed snapshot; live PubMed/Crossref resolver + a judged bench are OPEN.

capabilities.claim: Bilingual corpus + Cantonese/Chinese handling in the gate and corpus.
capabilities.measured: 528 bilingual (EN/中文) corpus examples; gate scores a 中文 summary section. No separate multilingual benchmark number.
capabilities.limits: Two languages only; not a broad multilingual data-quality program.

capabilities.marketCategory: Model data strategy (PM + engineering) · Pre-training data engineering
capabilities.claim: Data-quality discipline as code: schema validation, poison-resistant ingestion, sealed held-out splits.
capabilities.measured: Corpus validation + holdout sealing run in CI; see evidence-manifest.json for corpus/leaderboard counts.
capabilities.limits: Demonstrates the discipline on a small first-party corpus, not at pre-training scale; a dataset-filter pass over a large corpus is OPEN.

capabilities.claim: A fail-closed verifier/gate kernel + MCP server: provenance gate, proof-carrying reasoning, formal contradiction check, exposed as tools.
capabilities.measured: Provenance gate: attribution-hallucination 36.1%->23.6% (Δ12.5%, 95% CI [5.6%,19.4%]) at 0% FP — the one result that clears the gate (RESULTS.md).
capabilities.limits: Verifier kernel is real; the broader 'reasoning system' still abstains on much it cannot machine-check.

capabilities.claim: An honest AGI-candidate research program: RSI/continual-learning scaffolds, pre-registered thresholds, a public failure ledger.
capabilities.measured: One validated provenance-delta result; all AGI-shaped modules labelled candidate/interface-only and thresholds honestly NOT yet met.
capabilities.limits: Not a claim of AGI. No third-party hidden-eval win yet; weight-updating RSI is OPEN (needs GPU).

capabilities.marketCategory: Agent Infrastructure Engineer (new role) · Supercomputing infrastructure
capabilities.claim: GPU orchestration for train/eval: RunPod pod/endpoint orchestration, parallel seeds, ETA, CI path-selection.
capabilities.measured: Orchestration runs and produces artifacts; demonstrates the path, not a frontier-scale cluster.
capabilities.limits: Rented compute orchestration, not owned-IDC operation; the most commoditized of the categories.

capabilities.claim: A shippable server surface: MCP server, gateway with least-privilege governance, service wiring.
capabilities.measured: MCP tools + gateway covered by passing tests.
capabilities.limits: Reference implementation, not a hardened production platform.
